steps.title: Clear the fractions
steps.content:
Multiply the equation by $80cx$:
$$
80=cx^2+80x
$$
Rearrange it as a quadratic:
$$
cx^2+80x-80=0
$$

steps.title: Use one-solution condition
steps.content:
A quadratic has exactly one real solution when its discriminant is $0$:
$$
80^2-4(c)(-80)=0
$$
$$
6400+320c=0
$$

steps.title: Solve for the constant
steps.content: Continue solving the linear equation: $$ 320c=-6400 $$ The answer is -20.
